conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 11 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | Overall
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed overall response (complete or partial response) of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document focuses on overall survival and time-to-event secondary endpoints, and adverse events. Objective response rates (overall, complete, stable, progressive disease) are not reported in the provided text or tables."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Objective Response Rate (ORR) for overall response in the treatment arm was not found in the provided document pages or through semantic search."

---
